news.t: Apple CEO Shift: 4 Under-the-Radar ETF Plays
Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
BlackRock Broadens Access to Global AI and Technology Growth Opportunities Through Two New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TEK is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.33%, SK hynix at 6.73%, Broadcom at 6.06%, Samsung Electronics at 5.78%, and Apple at 5.05%.

overview.description: The iShares Technology Opportunities Active ETF (TEK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US and non-US technology companies across all market capitalizations. The fund aims for long-term growth of capital, focusing on firms with rapid growth potential in the industry TEK was launched on Oct 21, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
